agreement_examples.text: մասնագետի համար նախ բժիշկ պիտի տեսնե՞մ
մասնագետի մոտ անվճար կարո՞ղ եմ գնալ

why_no_go: The disagreement set is still small and concentrated in one wording family rather than a broad replay-backed pattern.
The strongest disagreement sits next to stable specialist-routing behavior, so a live override could steal routing traffic.
There is not yet enough replay evidence showing that a bounded override improves net accuracy without harming protected routing or eligibility neighbors.
Current confidence is high inside the shadow ranker, but fallback safety has not been validated on a sufficiently diverse generic-specialist sample.
required_evidence_before_any_live_pilot: More shadow rows across diverse generic-specialist prompts, not just repeated referral-needed wording
Offline replay proving that destination/arrangement wording still stays with routing_specialist_referral_confusion_v1
Offline replay proving that free-care wording still stays with eligibility_status_coverage_root_v1
A concrete threshold rule that leaves the runtime winner untouched on mixed or weak evidence

current_recommendation.next_work_item: offline replay expansion and disagreement bucketing for generic-specialist prompts only
do_not_do_yet: No widening beyond the allowlisted family set
